hero.title:
Less manual work.
Stronger digital presence.

hero.description: We help businesses reduce manual work, look more professional online and win more customers with software and artificial intelligence.

services.title: Software, automation and intelligent systems under one roof.

items.title: We automate repetitive work with artificial intelligence.
items.description: We build systems for forms, emails, customer requests, reports and follow-up workflows so your team spends less time on manual operations.
features: Customer support and lead tracking systems
Proposal, report and content production flows
items.result: Your team manages more work with less operational load.
items.imageAlt: Business workflow automation dashboard with forms, messages, reports and assistant panels

items.title: We build fast websites that create trust and turn visitors into customers.
items.description: Corporate websites, landing pages and multilingual web structures make your digital presence clear, professional and conversion-focused.
items.result: Your website does more than look good; it guides visitors toward action.
items.imageAlt: Responsive corporate website and landing page mockups across desktop and mobile screens

items.title: We create fast, attention-ready ad content for your brand.
items.description: We prepare artificial intelligence supported video, visual and creative content for Instagram, TikTok and campaign testing.
features: Enhancing real shoots with artificial intelligence
items.result: You test more content ideas and publish stronger campaigns in less time.
items.imageAlt: Advertising content production board with video timeline, campaign visuals and creative assets

items.title: We develop custom web and mobile applications for your business.
items.description: We design and build digital products for your customers or internal teams from idea to launch.
features: Digital menu, catalog and business systems
items.result: Your business gets a usable, scalable digital product built around its real workflows.
items.imageAlt: Web admin dashboard with iOS and Android application screens

items.title: We clarify where artificial intelligence and digital transformation should start.
items.description: We analyze your business needs and identify which processes can improve through automation, better tools or digital products.
items.result: You start from the right place without wasting budget on unnecessary tools.
items.imageAlt: Strategy roadmap and process planning board for digital transformation consulting

items.title: We turn your digital presence into a measurable growth system.
items.description: We connect content, campaign planning, analytics and lead follow-up so marketing decisions become clearer and easier to improve.
items.result: Your marketing becomes easier to manage, measure and improve over time.
items.imageAlt: Marketing operations dashboard with campaign planning, funnel analytics and content calendar panels

work.title: Client feedback
work.pendingDescription: We do not show fake customer logos or inflated results. Approved client work will be added here once the visuals and outcomes are verified.

process.title: A clearer path from idea to working product.
process.description: We turn business needs into software, automation and AI-supported workflows with a process that stays visible from day one.

trust.title: Built like a software company, not a one-off project.

cards.title: Product-minded delivery
cards.description: We design systems that can evolve, not static pages that need to be rebuilt when the business changes.

cards.title: AI where it matters
cards.description: AI is used inside workflows, content pipelines and internal tools when it creates real operational leverage.

cards.title: Engineering discipline
cards.description: Integrations, analytics, email and external providers stay isolated behind clear contracts.

cta.title: Let’s turn one business problem into a working digital system.
cta.description: Share what you want to improve. We will suggest the simplest useful starting point.

about.metaDescription: OzGen AI helps businesses reduce manual work, look more professional online and win more customers with AI-supported systems.
about.title: OzGen AI is an AI-supported growth, automation and digital product studio.
about.description: We help businesses reduce manual work, strengthen their digital presence and turn repeatable operations into systems.
body: The work is intentionally focused: AI transformation, websites, advertising content, web and mobile applications, and practical consulting.
We do not sell vague transformation. We map the workflow, choose the right starting point, build the product or automation, and improve it after launch.
principles: Business rules stay separate from provider tools.
Side effects are explicit and intentionally ordered.
Every build should be understandable and maintainable six months later.

contact.metaDescription: Start a project or request a free discovery call with OzGen AI.
contact.title: Let’s define the software system your business needs.
contact.description: Tell us what should become faster, more automated or more professional. We will map the right starting point.

form.name: Full name
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about this request.
form.successDescription: Thanks. We will review your note and reply with a practical next step.

footer.tagline: Custom software, automation and AI-supported digital systems for businesses that want to scale with less friction.
